items.name: 社台1遺跡出土の朱塗土器

en.name_romaji: Shadai Ichi Iseki Shutsudo no Shunuri Doki
en.name_en: Red-Lacquered Pottery Excavated from the Shadai 1 Site
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property consisting of red-lacquered pottery excavated from the Shadai 1 site. It is a town-designated property located in Shiraoi Town, designated on 4 April 1986.

items.name: アヨロ遺跡出土の装身具等

en.name_en: Ornaments and Related Items Excavated from the Ayoro Site
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property consisting of personal ornaments and related items excavated from the Ayoro site. It is a town-designated property located in Shiraoi Town, designated on 4 April 1986.

items.name: 仙台藩白老元陣屋を描いた絵図面

en.name_romaji: Sendai-han Shiraoi Motojin'ya o Egaita Ezumen
en.name_en: Illustrated Plan Depicting the Sendai Domain's Shiraoi Main Camp
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property in the form of an illustrated plan depicting the Sendai domain's Shiraoi main camp (motojin'ya). It is a town-designated property located in Shiraoi Town, designated on 13 June 2023.

This is a folk cultural property (tangible) consisting of a ruunpe, a type of Ainu garment. It is a town-designated cultural property of Shiraoi Town, designated on 1986-04-04, located at the Ainu Museum.

en.name_en: Five Shrine Treasures of Shiraoi Hachiman Shrine
en.description_en: This is a folk cultural property (tangible) consisting of five shrine treasures of Shiraoi Hachiman Shrine. It is a town-designated cultural property of Shiraoi Town, designated on 1996-06-05, located at Shiraoi Hachiman Shrine.

items.name: アイヌ生活用具コレクション（児玉コレクション）

en.name_en: Collection of Ainu Daily-Life Implements (Kodama Collection)
en.description_en: This is a folk cultural property (tangible) consisting of a collection of Ainu daily-life implements known as the Kodama Collection. It is a town-designated cultural property of Shiraoi Town, designated on 2000-03-31, located at the Ainu Museum.

items.name: 虎杖浜越後盆踊り
items.location: 虎杖浜越後盆踊り保存会

en.description_en: This is a folk cultural property (intangible) consisting of the Kojohama Echigo Bon dance. It is a town-designated cultural property of Shiraoi Town, designated on 2000-10-03, maintained by the Kojohama Echigo Bon Dance Preservation Society.

items.name: 白老町伝統文化継承者
items.description: 認定年月日が複数：2007年3月8日、2008年12月12日、2011年3月30日、2013年3月28日、2015年3月30日、2017年3月23日等。伝統文化継承者一覧が別表に記載。初回認定は2007-03-08だが指定年月日は複数あり単一に確定できないためnull

en.name_en: Successors of Shiraoi Town Traditional Culture
en.description_en: This is a folk cultural property (intangible) recognizing successors of the traditional culture of Shiraoi Town. It is a town-designated cultural property of Shiraoi Town, with details recorded in a separate table.
